title: Testing Before Production with Snowglobe
tagline: Generate scenarios, run conversations, and score failures before users find them.

story.problem: An action-capable agent can still fail on conversations and approval paths you did not think to hand-test.
story.solution: Use Snowglobe to generate synthetic personas and scenarios, run them against the complete agent at scale, and score transcripts for regressions and action-safety failures.
story.outcome: A repeatable simulation harness that gives pre-release evidence before the complete agent reaches users.

prerequisites: A Stripe test-mode API key for live action scenarios

quickstart.configure: cp .env.example .env  # then fill NEBIUS_API_KEY, LANGSMITH_API_KEY, and STRIPE_SECRET_KEY for live action scenarios

endpoints.description: Run the agent under test and stream SSE events back.
Launch a Snowglobe simulation batch against the agent and return scored results.
